description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a mix of flat and sloped terracotta-tiled roofs, surrounded by a white picket fence and lush greenery. The main building is painted in a light neutral color, with several large windows and white shutters providing ample natural light. A spacious balcony with outdoor seating is visible on the upper floor, while the ground level includes a garage with a red-tiled roof and a paved driveway. The property is landscaped with mature trees and a small lawn area, enhancing its suburban appeal. The entryway is marked by a simple door and a small porch area, partially shaded by the overhanging roof. The overall design blends modern and Mediterranean influences, with clean lines and practical outdoor spaces.
description: A two-story house with terracotta-tiled roofs, white picket fencing, large windows, a balcony, and a garage, surrounded by trees and a small lawn.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade, balcony, garage, and the lush front yard with trees and fencing.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the sloped roof, upper balcony, and the depth of the property, with visible windows and fencing.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the garage entrance, driveway, and a clear look at the tiled roof and back garden area.
description_view_3: This angle displays the side and rear of the house, focusing on the secondary roof, windows, and the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and shutters
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small porch, shaded by an overhanging roof and adjacent to a white picket fence
